hunter.name: My Implant Dentist
hunter.description: My Implant Dentist is a dental practice that specializes in providing affordable Dental Implants in Perth & Brisbane.

apify.name: My Implant Dentist
apify.description:
My Implant Dentist (MID) is one of Australia’s fastest-growing dental implant and full-arch rehabilitation providers. We are known for our honest advice, transparent pricing and commitment to affordable clinical excellence.

From one Perth clinic in 2019, we’ve grown to 10+ locations across WA, QLD and VIC, supported by our own in-house digital dental lab and a national team dedicated to exceptional patient care. 

Our Mission
To make world-class implant dentistry accessible through a model built on transparency, affordability, advanced digital workflows and a consistently high-quality patient experience. Every patient deserves honest and clear options, predictable outcomes and genuine care.

What Sets Us Apart
• Honest, pressure-free treatment planning and upfront pricing
• State and National recognition and award-winning patient experience year after year. 

Our Team & Reach
We now have 200+ team members. Our clinics span metro, regional and remote communities across Western Australia, Brisbane and Melbourne.

Join Us
MID is expanding nationally and we’re always seeking talented clinicians and professionals who want to grow in a high-performance, supportive environment. Opportunities exist for implant and restorative dentists, surgical clinicians, general and cosmetic dentists, OHTs, nurses, treatment coordinators, dental technicians and operational specialists including practice managers, treatment coordinators, sales consultants, marketing. 

If you’re passionate about delivering exceptional patient care and want to be part of a team shaping the future of implant dentistry in Australia, connect with us to explore career opportunities.

hunter.name: Pure Dentistry
hunter.description: Pure Dentistry is a dental care provider that offers advanced surgical technology and 3D imaging for precise dental treatments and preventive care.

apify.name: Pure Dentistry Pty Ltd
apify.description:
Pure Dentistry — Accredited Modern Dental Care | Upper Mount Gravatt, Brisbane Southside
Five treatment rooms. Dedicated CBCT 3D imaging suite. On-site dental microscopes and advanced surgical technology for precise implants, complex extractions and nerve localisation. A preventive care room with our oral health therapist. And a saltwater fish tank in the waiting area — because nobody should dread the dentist.
We treat the full spectrum: routine check-ups, specialist paediatric dentistry for young children, IV sedation for anxious patients, and in-hospital general anaesthesia when clinical complexity demands it.
Emergency Dental from $85
Severe toothache. Abscess. Knocked-out or fractured teeth. Facial swelling. Uncontrolled bleeding. Mouth injuries and dental trauma in adults and children — assessed same day.
Our CBCT cone beam imaging is available on-site seven days a week, including Sundays and public holidays when external radiology is typically closed. Happy gas is offered for anxious or pain-sensitive patients with no fasting required.
Open 7 days — Saturdays, Sundays and after hours until 11pm.
Emergency slots are limited. Call 07 3343 4869 for same-day availability.
All dentists AHPRA-registered. Payment plans available: AfterPay, TLC, SuperCare.
Established 2015.

apify.name: Sydney Criminal Defence Lawyers
apify.description:
Sydney Criminal Defence Lawyers are a team of experts specialising in Criminal and Traffic Law. Our lawyers are in court every day, bringing a wealth of knowledge and experience to the progress of your legal matter.

We are dedicated professionals who bring empathy and understanding to your legal situation. We understand that many offences are committed because of a simple misunderstanding, honest mistake, or lapse in judgment. Our job is to vigorously defend your rights, and deliver the best possible outcome for you.

Based in the heart of the Sydney CBD, our lawyers regularly attend courts throughout the Sydney Metropolitan Area. We provide you with a complete Criminal and Traffic Law service, that begins at first contact with the police, through to the finalisation of your matter. By specialising in such specific areas of law, we provide you with an expert level of legal representation.

Based In Melbourne and Sydney Australian Family Lawyers provides legal advice in relation to Divorce and Separation, Property Settlement, and Children's Matters.

apify.name: MediaTek
apify.description:
MediaTek Incorporated (TWSE: 2454) is a global fabless semiconductor company that enables nearly 2 billion connected devices a year. We are a market leader in developing innovative systems-on-chip (SoC) for mobile, home entertainment, connectivity and IoT products. Our dedication to innovation has positioned us as a driving market force in several key technology areas, including highly power-efficient mobile technologies, automotive solutions and a broad range of advanced multimedia products such as smartphones, tablets, digital televisions, 5G, Voice Assistant Devices (VAD) and wearables. MediaTek empowers and inspires people to expand their horizons and achieve their goals through smart technology, more easily and efficiently than ever before. We work with the brands you love to make great technology accessible to everyone, and it drives everything we do. Visit www.mediatek.com for more information.

ALERT: MediaTek, along with other companies, have been the victim of unscrupulous individuals fraudulently purporting to be recruiters by fabricating job descriptions and extending spurious offers of employment in an effort to obtain sensitive personal information. We are currently working with authorities to investigate all wrong doings. If you believe you have been a victim, please contact careers.usa@mediatek.com.

Any interested candidates for worldwide positions at MediaTek are asked to apply only through mediatek.com, or via the applicable posting directly on LinkedIn.

apify.name: Family Doctor
apify.description:
Welcome to the Family Doctor group of medical and dental practices across Australia.

We are a network of 100% GP owned and operated medical and dental practices committed to comprehensive patient care. Our practices provide high quality medical care for our patients, and we pride ourselves in our services to the community.

The group was founded in 2008 and is seeking to grow further and is looking for like minded practice owners who are interested in succession planning, or to relieve themselves of the day to day administrative burdens of owning and operate a general practice. We offer a great package tailored to your needs with the added incentive of your practice then being owned and managed by an experienced GP. Message me now for a confidential discussion. 

Family Doctor is always looking for experienced General Practitioners (VR and non VR) to join our centres, and offer the following advantages:
- Family Doctor is 100% owned by a General Practitioner - no Investors and no Board. So the focus is always on delivering better patient outcomes (not shareholder outcomes!).
- Access to fantastic clinic resources such as MyCubiko and Up-To-Date at every practice.
- Complete billing and clinical autonomy.
- Fully flexible arrangement - work whenever and however you wish - no lock in agreements, no restraints.
- Special interests supported including skin cancer, IUD insertion, travel medicine, allergy skin testing and more.
- Expect billings of >$400 per hour due to exceptional support and systems.
- Friendly, supportive and modern environments and facilities.
See available opportunities here: https://familydoctor.com.au/gp_opportunities/

apify.name: Abrahams and Gross Attorneys
apify.description:

We offer legal services and expertise in numerous areas of law ranging from Family, Divorce and Matrimonial Law, Litigation, Corporate and Commercial Law, Insolvency Law, Labour and Employment Law, Criminal Law and Conveyancing and Property Law to Estate Planning, Administration of Deceased Estates, Wills and Trusts, as well as Maritime and Shipping Law, Notarial Deeds, Immigration Law and Debt Collection. 

Located in the heart of Cape Town’s CBD, our friendly and experienced team of attorneys are waiting for your call.
specialties: Conveyancing and Property Law (incl Notarial Deeds)

apify.name: Employment Innovations (EI)
apify.description:
Exciting news: we are now part of Employment Hero!

Formerly Employment Innovations (EI) - we're your HR, Payroll, Safety and Legal experts here to help businesses be more compliant and productive. With a blend of intuitive software and our expertise in the field, we've been leading the charge in transforming how employers handle their workforce needs.

For over 30 years, we've been driven by a passion for innovation and a commitment to excellence, and in April 2024, we joined forces with Employment Hero to become the ultimate employment solution for SMEs and their workforces across the globe.

Ready to learn more? Head over to https://employmenthero.com/services/managed-payroll/

apify.name: MEGT (Australia) Ltd
apify.description:
MEGT (Australia) Ltd is a not-for profit business established in 1982 which is a steadfast advocate of employment and training for all, playing an integral role in building the Australian workforce for in demand jobs and skills of the future.

MEGT has supported more than 700,000 Australians to complete their qualifications, and partnered with over 250,000 businesses to create sustainable employment solutions.

With more than 40 years experience in the Vocational Education & Training (VET) sector, MEGT successfully delivers federal and state government services, including the Australian Apprenticeship Support Services and Workforce Australia contracts. We are:

• The largest single Australian Apprenticeship Support Services provider servicing more than 100,000 active apprentices and trainees per year
• A registered Group Training Organisation (GTO) which employs apprentices and trainees who are placed within our host employer network
• Supporting 4,000 participants across both our generalist and youth specific (Transition to Work) Workforce Australia programs into employment and further training in the Western Melbourne and Gold Coast employment regions
• Delivering state-based employment programs, including empowering First Nations people, with training and employment opportunities
• National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) providers via the School Leavers Employment Services (SLES) and employment support for school leavers with disabilities
• Able to offer flexible workforce solutions via the labour hire arm of our business

apify.name: Aria Dental
apify.description:
At Aria Dental, the art and science of practical dentistry come together to achieve high-quality, long-lasting results. Our philosophy is simple; we strive for excellence. We aim to provide the highest quality dental care in a positive environment and, by doing so, make a lasting difference in our patient’s confidence and quality of life.

Aria Dental has built an outstanding reputation as Western Australia’s leading specialist-led dental implant clinics, located across the Perth metro area. We have convenient locations in Perth CBD, Maddington, North Perth, Scarborough and Midland. 

The Aria Dental family is a collective of leading dentists, registered dental specialists, oral surgeons, oral health therapists and a caring dental support team – so you can be assured that whatever help you need, you’re in the best hands – in a comfortable environment.

At Aria Dental, we have a large, in-house digital laboratory with a team of highly trained professionals producing some of the highest quality prostheses in the world. Patients benefit from our in-house technicians with fewer appointments, faster treatment and a better level of service.

Aria Dental is keen to build a strong working relationship with new referring dentists. Our Specialist, Dr Michael Zaninovich works closely with referring dentists and is available to discuss all aspects of the treatment from the planning phase to the prosthodontic and/or surgical phase.

apify.description:
We offer fixed price dentistry to Australians for $99 per dental treatment. Treatments include a check-up and clean, a filling, a simple tooth extraction or a toothache management treatment. The price includes any X-rays relevant to the treatment. 

We currently have clinics all across Sydney and plan to expand nation-wide, s that all Australians can have access to affordable dental care.

hunter.name: Fallon Solutions
hunter.description: Fallon Solutions is a home services company that provides plumbing, electrical, and air conditioning solutions with a focus on customer satisfaction and timely service.

apify.name: Fallon Solutions
apify.description:
Found a leak or blocked drain?
Having a power issue at your home or work?
Plumbing making strange noises or vibrations?
 
The Fallon Solutions local team is here for you. We’ve got the perfect solution for you no matter the problem.
 
Fallon Solutions provide Electrical, Plumbing, Air Conditioning, Solar, Appliance Repair, Data & Carpentry, across the South East Queensland region.
 
One Call Fixes It All 1300 873 105
 
We pride ourselves on our reputation for quality workmanship, timely service and customer satisfaction. This is backed by a history of more than 60 years, employing only highly skilled and qualified technicians, regular staff training and continuous investment in being the industry leader and a service-centric business that leads customers on a journey that begins with an inspection to identify the damage or problem you are facing. You may need our help to fix, install, replace, or upgrade an issue you have with your home or business including a switchboard, light fitting, drain, hot water system, exhaust fan, smoke alarm or solar panel.
 
We are fully committed to ongoing training with our staff and then further training to keep abreast of industry standards in their areas of speciality. We ensure that all our staff are fully trained in all aspects of safety and provide regular opportunities to cross skill into other areas. Our team is fully licensed and insured to service your home or business - from your kitchen to your bathroom to your laundry and shower.
 
Over 100 tradespeople have completed their apprenticeship with Fallon Solutions since 1962. In 2005 one of our apprentices won the highly acclaimed ECA/Clipsal Apprentice of the Year and in 2003 Fallon Solutions was nominated Host Employer of the Year by Electro Group in appreciation of our contribution in providing quality 'on the job' training for apprentices. 2022 Master Electricians National Awards - We had an apprentice of the year winner!

apify.name: Fixed Group
apify.description:
Fixed Group comprises Fixed and Fixed Medical, providing refurbishment, fit-out, strip out and maintenance services across a range of property and building types.  From resort renovations to your local cafe fit-out or shopping centre pop-up, we are the experts in designing solutions to meet any budget and any timeframe. We welcome clients of any size for any type of problem. From fitting door handles and patching a wall to delivering highly-specialised medical installation services and complete hotel refurbishments.  

From the outset, the Fixed Group has focused on developing a service delivery method that minimises customer disruption, and therefore reduces operational risk and potential loss of earnings for the client.  With our proven methodology, we have established ourselves as the industry specialist for the delivery of installation, construction and maintenance projects to live building and commercial environments. Our unique process enables us to carry out installation and maintenance works to hospitals, labs, medical facilities, aged care facilities, hotels, resorts, and childcare facilities, all whilst our client continues full operation of its regular commercial activities.

Our success has been built on our philosophy of listening to our clients and delivering on their needs, every time. Our continued focus on providing exceptional customer service and quality workmanship has resulted in the development of strong long-term relationships with many satisfied clients.  Put simply, your problems are solved with Fixed.

hunter.name: Complete Home Filtration
hunter.description: Complete Home Filtration is a water filtration company that offers custom-built filtration units to protect Australian homes from limescale, sediments, and unwanted chemicals, safeguarding pipes, taps, and fixtures.

apify.name: Complete Home Filtration
apify.description:
Protect your home and investment with Complete Home Filtration.

CHF is the industry-leading provider of better water for Australian homes. Our custom-built water filtration units deal with limescale, sediments and unwanted chemicals, protecting pipes, taps and fixtures throughout the property. These 4-stage, 1-micron filter systems remove 98.5% of chlorine and its by-products, allowing homeowners to enjoy chemical-free water from any tap or outlet in their home.

In addition to our award-winning retail services, we work with builders across the country to provide better water - and better value - to their clients. Softened, filtered water brings a wide variety of quality-of-life improvements, from rehydrating your skin and hair to increasing the lifespan of water-using appliances - and, of course, it tastes incredible!

By building with a Complete Home Filtration system, new homeowners can enjoy all the benefits of better water from day one. To find out how you can improve the value and longevity of your client’s property - or become one of our referral partners - check out our Build with CHF website.
specialties: Whole House Water Filtration System Installation

We are designers for the built environment—delivering solutions that are equal parts big picture and small details.  
 
We thrive in the often uncomfortable space between vision and viability. Drawing on 28 years of expertise, we understand how to push the limits of creativity without breaking them. With 11 studios across Australia and New Zealand, we have the capability too. Realising beauty in everything from city-shaping infrastructure to life-changing abodes. Ensuring big ideas dreamt up in the dark of night, stack up in the light of day.  
 
We are Plus Studio. Where creativity meets precision.
